title: Senator Shannon Grove (R-Bakersfield) today announced the introduction of SB 13 to encourage the ethical use of oil in California which would help lower the price of gasoline and i

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California produces about 340,000 barrels of oil per day, while the state needs 1.45 million barrels daily.",
    "About 45 percent of California's oil imports come directly from the Amazon Rainforest in Ecuador, Brazil, Guyana, and Colombia.",
    "Much of the crude oil imported into California comes from foreign nations with demonstrated human rights abuses or lower environmental standards than California.",
    "The Air Resources Board would be required to report the amount of particulate matter released from the 600 tanker ships importing oil into California.",
    "Studies have shown that shipping oil adds $5 to $6 to the cost of a barrel of oil, or about 30 cents per gallon of gasoline.",
    "Sending oil through a pipeline from Kern County to a Los Angeles refinery is a safer and cheaper way to produce gasoline in California.",
    "Expanding domestic oil production would remove the need for hundreds of polluting tanker ships delivering oil to California."
  ]
}
```
